name: MoonRun
short_description: Fight incoming waves in this classic pixel-art arcade game! Put your top-tier aiming skills to the test, get rewarded, and trade up your ammo to defeat the final boss.
detailed_description:
Fight incoming waves in this classic pixel-art arcade game! Put your top-tier aiming skills to the test, get rewarded, and trade up your ammo to defeat the final boss.

Don't be fooled by MoonRun's simple aesthetic and pace; it requires a skilled player to make it all the way to the end, so good luck, and have fun out there!

MoonRun is pure arcade nostalgia-bait with perfectly crafted pixel art goodness, to give it that undeniable taste of a retro classic. We invite you to lace up and find out exactly kind of threat we are under and help defend our hard earned resources
about_the_game:
